sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.47 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: Let$K$be a finite extension of degree$n$of a field$k$of odd characteristic. The multiplicative group$K^{*}$embeds into the group of all$k$-linear automorphisms$_{k}(K)$by the rule$t(x) = tx$for all$x K$. For a fixed basis of$K$over$k$, the group$_k(K)$is isomorphic to$GL(n,k)$. The image of$K^{*}$is called a nonsplit maximal torus corresponding to the extension$K/k$and is denoted by$T(K/k)$. reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
